programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Volunteers (16-7, 6-4 SEC) try to bounce back as they visit the Bulldogs (11-12, 3-7). Tennessee comes off a 74-71 loss at Kentucky that snapped a four-game win streak. Mississippi State junior guard Josh Hubbard averages 20.6 points per contest.

programme.title: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: From Charles Schwab Field Omaha in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Tennessee Volunteers welcome the LSU Tigers to the Food City Center for a sold-out 'Dark Mode' game. Rick Barnes leads the Volunteers against Matt McMahon and the Tigers as Ja'Kobi Gillespie and Dedan Thomas Jr. clash in this SEC battle.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Tennessee hosts Oklahoma at Food City Center. Guard Ja'Kobi Gillespie leads the Volunteers' attack against Xzayvier Brown and the Sooners. This crucial SEC matchup sees both teams striving to solidify their position in the conference rankings.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Tennessee travels to face No. 19 Vanderbilt at the Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville. Rick Barnes leads the Volunteers against Mark Byington and the Commodores as stars Ja'Kobi Gillespie and Tyler Tanner clash in this pivotal SEC Clash.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Tennessee Volunteers travel to Columbia to face the Missouri Tigers at Mizzou Arena. This SEC clash features Tennessee currently ranked in the top four and a resilient Missouri team that recently secured a high-profile win over Vanderbilt.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 17 Alabama travels to face No. 22 Tennessee in a marquee SEC rematch at Food City Center. Both teams enter the contest with identical conference records, battling for a top-four seed and a double-bye in the upcoming SEC Tournament.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Tennessee looks for its second win of the season over Auburn when they meet in the SEC Tournament. The Volunteers handled the Tigers, 77-69 back on Jan. 31. Auburn defeated Mississippi State, 65-57, in first round action.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Vanderbilt battles Tennessee for state bragging rights in an SEC Tournament quarterfinal game. These teams split a pair of regular season matches, with each scoring a four-point win on the other team's floor.

programme.title: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: From Charles Schwab Field Omaha in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: John Calipari begins his second season with the No. 14 Razorbacks as they host the Jaguars. Calipari looks to build off Arkansas' Sweet Sixteen run last season, and added two top NBA Draft prospects in freshman guards Darius Acuff and Meleek Thomas.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 6 Cardinals play the No. 25 Razorbacks in the SEC/ACC Challenge. Louisville is 7-0 for the first time since 2021 after beating NJIT by 57. Arkansas is 2-0 all-time at the Challenge. Hogs freshman Meleek Thomas averages 17.6 points per game.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 15 Arkansas (11-3) travels to Neville Arena for an SEC clash with Auburn. Freshman Darius Acuff Jr. (19.5 PPG) leads the Hogs, while Keyshawn Hall (20.1 PPG) counters for the Tigers. Auburn aims to recover from an OT loss to Georgia.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 17 Razorbacks travel to Athens to take on the No. 21 Bulldogs. Georgia's Somtochukwu Cyril has been a revelation, averaging 2.9 blocks and 6.1 rebounds per game. Arkansas' Darius Acuff Jr. is one of the nation's premier scorers with 19.9 PPG.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: Tyler Tanner leads No. 10 Vanderbilt against No. 17 Arkansas at Bud Walton Arena. The Razorbacks look to utilize Trevon Brazile's interior defense against Devin McGlockton and a surging Commodores squad in a battle for SEC supremacy.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: From Bud Walton Arena in Fayetteville, Ark.

programme.desc: This Emmy Award-winning studio show, which airs following NBA telecasts on ESPN, is hosted by Ernie Johnson, with analysis from Hall of Famer Charles Barkley and NBA champions Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. programme.desc: SVP's up at midnight and bringing his unique perspective on games people play to "SportsCenter" viewers. The hourlong, late-night show is driven by the host's self-deprecating wit and passion for sports, with featured elements, including Van Pelt's nightly "1 Big Thing" commentary and a weekly look back at the moments that drove bettors wild in "Bad Beats." programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Trekin Outdoors
programme.desc: Uncle Steve, Chris and Tyler of Trekin Outdoors take you into the real and raw realities of everyday hunting. Chasing big game across public and private lands. Showcasing the challenges that ordinary outdoorsmen face.

programme.title: Everything Eichler

programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.desc: Jon tackles spring's toughest challenge: catching walleyes under bright skies and high pressure. He details how small tweaks in cadence, line, and lure color can turn the tide. Then, as autumn settles in, Jon enjoys calm fall conditions - proving that even glassy water can produce limits when you slow down and fish smart.

programme.desc: Peter Deeks guides Bill into the tributaries of the Indian River Lagoon in search of tarpon!

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green

programme.title: Salt Water Sportsman National Seminar Series
programme.desc: George Poveromo and panel discuss successful wahoo tactics.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob is alone and on a mission. His target? Sight fishing Shallow water sharks on fly.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: Like many anglers, Jared was introduced to fishing as a young boy by his father; Jared wants to return the lifelong favor and get his dad on some Venice Bull Reds in Louisiana, joined by Capt. James Peters.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz find some backcountry action along the shoreline of the Cape of Florida with Capt. Brian Gwilliam; George and Lain visit Crane Point Hammock in Marathon; chef Cat prepares an Italian fish recipe submitted by fan Chuckie D.
